title: TestSavant.AI
description: Automated and human-augmented adversarial red-teaming engine that stress-tests generative and agentic AI applications under adversarial conditions and produces evidence-grade findings mapped to risk categories. Runs domain-specific and generic attack suites, multi-turn and multi-agent attack simulations with reconnaissance-driven adaptive attackers, and scheduled regression testing against live endpoints, browser UIs, and CI/CD pipelines.

items: Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Multi-agent scenario simulations for collusion, misalignment, or deception detection.
Validate agent decisions against expected goal plans.
Runtime guardrails & moderation; anomalous tool use
Correlate telemetry from agent step tracing, tool execution, & message logs.
Alert on anomalies;  e.g., goal reversal, unexpected plan depth, adversarial-input, excessive tool usage, or rapid inter-agent chatter.
